docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $70.00 FILED BY KUN, JOHN MR. AS TO DEFENDANT VAN OURKIRK, CALVIN MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1997 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
